result.reason: The issue describes mRemoteNG prematurely updating the remote clipboard, which can lead to unintended overwrites or data loss for the user.
result.approach: Investigate the WM_CLIPBOARDUPDATE handler in frmMain.cs to understand how local clipboard changes are propagated to the remote session. Implement logic to only trigger remote clipboard synchronization when a user-initiated copy or paste action occurs, or when the application has specific context indicating such an update is intended.
